title: Checklist, have more than just a tick

posts.author: stuartsjg (Stuart Graham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

We use the checklist feature quite often where a task or subtask is overkill. Sometimes we use it for things which may be suggestions, but may be removed.

Currently it can be ticked or unticked, what about having a right click to select the symbols which are available in other fields?
